news.title: New microchip-sized device could dramatically accelerate the future of quantum computing
news.snippet: A new microchip-sized device could dramatically accelerate the future of quantum computing. It controls laser frequencies with extreme precision while using far less power than today's bulky equipment.

tech.title: The Best AI Tools for 2026
tech.snippet: Over the past three years, I've tried dozens of AI tools for different tasks. Here are the best AI tools I've found, organized by category with guides to learn most tools.
